category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides reversible directory-local environment variable manipulations.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is shadowenv; current_curation.display-name is shadowenv; official documentation uses the same project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Shopify-hosted documentation site for shadowenv.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/Shopify/shadowenv, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists shadowenv; source_facts.description identifies directory-local environment variable manipulation.
